titles.title: CLEAR Path Act
CLEAR Path Act
Conflict-free Leaving Employment and Activity Restrictions Path Act
CLEAR Path Act
Conflict-free Leaving Employment and Activity Restrictions Path Act
CLEAR Path Act
Conflict-free Leaving Employment and Activity Restrictions Path Act
A bill to amend title 18, United States Code, to prevent and mitigate the potential for conflicts of interest following government service, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary.
Committee on the Judiciary. Ordered to be reported with an amendment in the nature of a substitute favorably.
Committee on the Judiciary. Reported by Senator Grassley with an amendment in the nature of a substitute. Without written report.

calendar.text: Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under General Orders. Calendar No. 305.

vote.text: Passed Senate with an amendment by Voice Vote.

reference.label: text of amendment in the nature of a substitute

action.text: Message on Senate action sent to the House.

committee.name: Senate Judiciary
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To, Referred To

term.name: Government employee pay, benefits, personnel management
Government ethics and transparency, public corruption
